expectations.text: Creates a prefillTransformer for the burials-ez form
expectations.evidence: Creates prefill-transformer.js that extracts claimant data from formData.data.attributes.claimant, returns ssn, vaFileNumber at root, plus claimantFullName, claimantSocialSecurityNumber, claimantDateOfBirth mapped to form's custom field names.
Adds ...profilePersonalInfoPage() with dataAdapter mapping to claimantFullName, claimantSocialSecurityNumber, claimantDateOfBirth. Replaces the manual personalInformation page.

expectations.text: Adds profileContactInfoPages to formConfig OR explains why it should not be added (e.g., incompatible data model, custom field names)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly explains why profileContactInfoPages should NOT be added: 'Contact info pages are NOT replaced with profileContactInfoPages because the form uses custom field names (claimantAddress, claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone) and includes an international phone field not supported by the profile pattern.' Keeps existing manual contact pages.

expectations.text: Adds route protection in the form's container/App component
expectations.evidence: Enhances BurialsApp.jsx route protection to check formData?.claimantFullName || formData?.ssn as save-in-progress data indicator.

expectations.text: Describes vets-api backend steps including form_profile.rb changes
expectations.evidence: Describes adding 21P-530EZ to ALL_FORMS (burials category) and FORM_ID_TO_CLASS mapping to FormProfiles::VA21P530EZ.

expectations.text: Describes creating a FormProfile class for the form
expectations.evidence: Describes creating FormProfiles::VA21P530EZ with metadata: version 0, prefill true, returnUrl '/claimant-information/personal-information'.

expectations.text: Describes the form profile mapping YAML
expectations.evidence: Describes creating 21P-530EZ.yml with claimant field mappings from identity_information (ssn, va_file_number, full_name, etc.).

expectations.text: Describes adding prefill settings to settings.yml, development.yml, and test.yml
expectations.evidence: Describes adding burials: prefill: true to all three settings files.

expectations.text: Does not attempt to create or modify files outside the vets-website workspace
expectations.evidence: All backend changes are DESCRIBED only. Frontend changes within vets-website workspace.

quality_bonuses.text: Correctly identifies when profileContactInfoPages is incompatible with the form's data model and explains the reasoning
quality_bonuses.evidence: Thoroughly analyzes the form's data model: identifies claimantAddress, claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone as custom field names. Notes international phone is not supported by the standard pattern. Keeps existing manual pages. Design decision documented clearly.

quality_bonuses.text: Preserves existing form field names and data model rather than blindly replacing them
quality_bonuses.evidence: Transformer maps to form's actual field names (claimantFullName, claimantSocialSecurityNumber, claimantDateOfBirth). Existing mailingAddress and contactInformation pages kept intact with original field names.

quality_notes: Perfect score on both base assertions AND quality bonuses. The with-skill variant demonstrated deep architectural analysis — correctly identified the incompatible data model, used dataAdapter for personal info mapping, preserved existing contact pages, and explained the reasoning clearly. This is the ideal implementation for burials-ez.
